<!--

headings (Added / Changed / Deprecated / Removed / Fixed / Security):

- us-congress → us-congress/CHANGELOG.md — for GraphQL API consumers: new/changed
  types, fields, enums, filters, connections; deprecations/removals; query behavior

Both components follow SemVer; mcp-server is pre-1.0, so breaking changes bump the
minor. Feature PRs add entries under [Unreleased]; a release PR renames [Unreleased]
